allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/c/Users/user/.claude.json'\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('mcpServers',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('--- projects mcp ---'\); [print\(k, json.dumps\(v.get\('mcpServers',{}\),indent=2\)\) for k,v in d.get\('projects',{}\).items\(\) if v.get\('mcpServers'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/c/Users/user/.claude.json'\)\); print\('TOP:',json.dumps\(d.get\('mcpServers',{}\),indent=2\)\); [print\('PROJ',k,json.dumps\(v.get\('mcpServers',{}\),indent=2\)\) for k,v in d.get\('projects',{}\).items\(\) if v.get\('mcpServers'\)]")

PowerShell($d = Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "=== TOP-LEVEL mcpServers ==="; $d.mcpServers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6; "=== PROJECT-LEVEL mcpServers ==="; $d.projects.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { if \($_.Value.mcpServers\) { $_.Name; $_.Value.mcpServers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 } })
